# File Transfer Extension - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
VS Code Extension that provides a dual-pane file transfer interface within VS Code. Users can:
- Open source and destination folders
- View folder contents in side-by-side panes
- Transfer selected files between locations
- Replace original files with modified versions

## Key Features
1. Dual-pane UI (Source and Destination)
2. Folder selection via dialog buttons
3. File listing with selection
4. Transfer buttons (both directions)
5. File preview capability
